## What were you trying to do?

<!-- Describe the action you were attempting, e.g. "Transcribe a .wav file and view the transcript" -->


## What did you expect to happen?

<!-- e.g. "The transcript should appear in the Transcript tab after processing" -->


## What actually happened?

<!-- Describe what went wrong. Include any visible error messages or unusual behavior. -->


## Did the app crash?

- [ ] Yes — app closed unexpectedly
- [ ] Yes — app froze and became unresponsive
- [ ] No — it stayed open but behaved incorrectly

**If it crashed, please paste the terminal output or traceback here:**

```
(paste traceback or error output here)
```

| Field | Your answer |
|-------|-------------|

| Approximate length | e.g. "3 minutes" |
| Language of audio | e.g. Turkish, English |
| Recording environment | e.g. quiet room, phone call, meeting room |
